audio_layers.policy: Use volume tuning before removal if regions sound too busy.
Future region playlists should map Atlas mood to biome pools, not names alone.
Keep material feedback; verify snow/sand/stone footstep contrast in field tests.
Keep debug logging off; check caves/mountains for overpowering echo.
Supports broad fantasy tone; region-specific playlists remain future work.

region_audio_policy.music_mood: warm medieval strings, light flute, calm travel themes
region_audio_policy.ambient_sound_mood: meadow wind, birds, soft village distance, light leaves
region_audio_policy.danger_mood: safe but not sterile; danger should be signposted and sparse

region_audio_policy.music_mood: low drones, lonely horns, glassy bells, restrained percussion
region_audio_policy.ambient_sound_mood: cold wind, crunching snow, distant ice cracks, aurora quiet
region_audio_policy.danger_mood: survival pressure, cold isolation, frozen-ocean threat

region_audio_policy.music_mood: dry percussion, oud-like plucks, sparse desert travel lines
region_audio_policy.ambient_sound_mood: dry wind, sand hiss, insects, distant heat shimmer

region_audio_policy.music_mood: lush strings, hand drums, rainstick-like texture, coastal motifs
region_audio_policy.ambient_sound_mood: rainforest insects, frogs, surf, mangrove water, heavy leaves
region_audio_policy.danger_mood: dense, alive, hard to see through, ambush-friendly

region_audio_policy.music_mood: low drums, hammered strings, mountain horns, sparse stone ambience
region_audio_policy.ambient_sound_mood: high wind, rock echoes, gravel steps, distant ravens or goats if present
region_audio_policy.danger_mood: vertical, exposed, echoing, hard to cross

region_audio_policy.music_mood: frost strings blended with wet coastal ambience
region_audio_policy.ambient_sound_mood: cold surf, wet leaves, ice cracks, gulls if present

region_audio_policy.music_mood: frost drones with mountain horns and stone percussion
region_audio_policy.ambient_sound_mood: cold high wind, snow through pines, rockfall echoes

region_audio_policy.music_mood: humid percussion with desert plucks and low strings
region_audio_policy.ambient_sound_mood: rain on hot leaves, insects, distant surf, dry thunder

region_audio_policy.music_mood: desert percussion with stone drones and tense low brass
region_audio_policy.ambient_sound_mood: dry cliff wind, grit, distant rockslide, sparse insects

region_audio_policy.music_mood: oppressive drones, broken choirs, sparse drums, corrupted ambience
region_audio_policy.ambient_sound_mood: distant thunder, unnatural wind, low rumbles, hostile silence

region_audio_policy.music_mood: low infernal drones, basalt percussion, distant ritual tones
region_audio_policy.ambient_sound_mood: fire, basalt echoes, soul wind, lava pressure

region_audio_policy.music_mood: void pads, distant choir, sparse crystalline pulses
region_audio_policy.ambient_sound_mood: thin wind, chorus shimmer, void silence
